This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Eremogone haitzeshanensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
